title: RDK 7Pcs Large Glass Bowls Clear Art Glass Fruit Trifle Salad Dessert Ice Cream Sundae Appetizer Crystal Look Footed Serving Bowls Set
features: 7 Piece Glass Bowls Set Decorative Fruit Salad Trifle Bowls Dessert Ice Cream Pudding Dishes Glass Appetizer Prawn Cocktail Salad Bowls Snack Serving Punch Bowl.
Perfectly display & serve individual portions plus extra of delicious food such as fruits salads, ice-cream, puddings or may be even appetizer prawn cocktails!

Elevate the presentation of your culinary creations, whether it's vibrant fruit salads, decadent ice cream, creamy puddings, or delightful appetizer prawn cocktails. Crafted from high-quality transparent glass, each bowl boasts a deep and flared design, perfect for showcasing a variety of flavorful fillings. Whether you're serving individual portions or creating a stunning centerpiece with the entire set, these bowls cater to diverse dining needs with finesse.

Designed for durability, our glass bowls set is made from thick glass, ensuring longevity and resilience to frequent use. The set comprises 1 large glass bowl and 6 small glass bowls, offering versatility and convenience for a range of occasions.
Large Bowl Dimensions: Height: 8.5cm, Diameter: 20cm Small Bowl Dimensions: Height: 5cm, Diameter: 11.3cm.
